metadata.title: ClipProfit - Creator Campaign Marketplace
metadata.description: Connect casino businesses with social media creators for view-based ad campaigns.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue to ClipProfit
signIn.passwordUpdated: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
signIn.callbackFailed: We could not finish signing you in. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: Check your email - we sent a password reset link.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Create your ClipProfit account to get started
signUp.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account and get started.

email.subject: Confirm your ClipProfit account
email.title: Confirm your account
email.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
email.footer: This link expires in 15 minutes. If you did not create a ClipProfit account, you can ignore this email.

confirm.title: Confirm your account
confirm.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
confirm.invalidBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

api.rateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
api.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.

page.panelTitle: Almost there. Let's set up your account.
page.panelDescription: Just one step before you can start browsing campaigns and tracking earnings.
page.title: Welcome to ClipProfit
page.description: Just a few quick questions to get you started.

form.sourceQuestion: Where did you hear about us?
form.nicheQuestion: What niche(s) do you create content for?
form.completeBody: Two more things unlock your first payout: connecting a social account and joining a campaign. Pick one to start.
form.skip: Skip for now - go to campaigns

legal.englishOnlyNotice: These legal documents are currently available in English only.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to view this page.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone
deleteAccount.warning: This will permanently delete all your data from the servers, including your profile, connected accounts, submissions, and earnings history.
deleteAccount.confirmLabel: Type CONFIRM to delete your ClipProfit account and all data

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.noneDetail: Connect a social account to join campaigns.
accounts.connectedValue: {count, plural, one {# verified account} other {# verified accounts}}

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the dashboard language for this browser. The setting is saved immediately.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emptyBio: No bio yet. Add one to tell others about yourself.

username.label: Username
username.helper: Unique across ClipProfit. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.

displayName.label: Display name
displayName.helper: The name that shows on your dashboard, profile, and leaderboards.

bio.label: Bio
bio.helper: A short line about the kind of clips you make. Up to 280 characters.

wallet.label: Payout address
wallet.helper: Where your withdrawals will be sent by default. Starts with T.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

page.title: Good to see you, {name}
page.description: Start with the one thing that needs your attention now.

drawerSection.title: Open only when needed
drawerSection.description: Payouts, campaigns, stats, and recent submissions are still here, but no longer stacked on the dashboard.

snapshot.title: Operating snapshot
snapshot.description: Compact account, campaign, and submission numbers.

submissions.title: Recent submissions
submissions.description: Latest clips moving through review, approval, and payout.

connect.title: Connect a social account to start earning
connect.description: We need a connected account to track your views and match clips to campaigns.

payment.title: Add a payment method before your next payout
payment.description: You have unpaid earnings, but we don't have a way to send them to you yet.

finishProfile.title: Finish your profile
finishProfile.detail: Campaign eligibility starts with a complete profile.

connectAccount.title: Connect a posting account
connectAccount.detail: Connect TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or Facebook so tracking can work.

joinCampaign.title: Join a campaign
joinCampaign.detail: Pick a campaign that matches your platform and payout target.

checkPendingClips.title: Check pending clips
checkPendingClips.detail: Review status, fixes, and earnings from your submitted clips.

reviewPayoutStatus.title: Review payout status
reviewPayoutStatus.detail: Approved earnings are ready to track in Payments.

submitAnotherClip.title: Submit another clip
submitAnotherClip.detail: Open a joined campaign and send the next post URL.

payoutSummary.title: Payout summary
payoutSummary.description: Available balance moves to pending when you request a payout, then to profit after payment.

activeCampaigns.title: Active campaigns
activeCampaigns.description: Campaigns you have joined or started. Open one to submit the next clip.
activeCampaigns.emptyDescription: Browse the marketplace and join a campaign that matches your connected accounts.

operatingSnapshot.title: Operating snapshot
operatingSnapshot.description: The numbers stay compact so the next action remains obvious.

recentSubmissions.title: Recent submissions
recentSubmissions.description: Latest clips moving through review, approval, and payout.

liveEarnings.title: Live Earnings
liveEarnings.activeClips: {count, plural, one {# active clip} other {# active clips}}
liveEarnings.estimatedHelp: Views x CPV across approved, unsettled clips. Updates as views come in.
liveEarnings.error: Could not refresh live earnings - retrying in 60s.

score.title: Performance Score
score.emptyBody: Your score will appear after a few approved submissions.
score.emptyDetail: We grade you on approval rate, view performance vs. campaign benchmarks, trust, on-time delivery, and audience fit.

activation.title: Get started
activation.subtitle: Finish these steps to unlock your first payout.

profile.label: Complete your profile
profile.description: Add a display name and unique username so we can identify you.

account.label: Connect a social account
account.description: Connected accounts unlock campaigns and let us track your views.

clip.label: Submit your first clip
clip.description: Pick a campaign you've joined and submit a clip URL.

payment.label: Add a payment method
payment.description: Required before your first payout - you can do this later.

approval.label: Get your first approved clip
approval.description: Once a clip is reviewed and approved, you start earning per verified view.

header.title: Command Center
header.description: Start here for the next operator move, then open details only when you need them.

actionQueue.title: Daily Action Queue
actionQueue.description: Sorted by operational urgency, not by menu order.

coreNumbers.title: Core numbers
coreNumbers.description: The first strip stays small; deeper reporting opens from Reports.

drillIns.title: Drill-ins
drillIns.description: Open the specific area when the daily queue points there.

followUps.title: {count, plural, one {Follow up with # brand lead} other {Follow up with # brand leads}}
followUps.detail: Lead follow-ups are due now. Move the lead, book the call, or keep it warm.

onboarding.title: {count, plural, one {# onboarding checklist blocked} other {# onboarding checklists blocked}}
onboarding.detail: Contract, payment, brief, assets, audience, and assigned clippers must be complete before production.

overdue.title: {count, plural, one {# overdue production assignment} other {# overdue production assignments}}
overdue.detail: Production starts at assigned clip, not after the creator submits. Clear overdue work first.

review.title: {count, plural, one {Review # clip} other {Review # clips}}
review.detail: {missingLogo, plural, one {# missing-logo item} other {# missing-logo items}}, {revisionAssignments, plural, one {# revision assignment} other {# revision assignments}}.

payout.title: Close the payout loop
payout.detail: {payoutRuns, plural, one {# payout run} other {# payout runs}} in progress, {amount} owed from legacy payouts.

guide.title: {count, plural, one {# guide needs review} other {# guides need review}}
guide.detail: Keep sales, onboarding, recruitment, production, clip review, payouts, and reporting guides current.

risk.title: {count, plural, one {Resolve # open risk signal} other {Resolve # open risk signals}}
risk.detail: {critical} critical, {tokenBroken} token-related. These feed delivery risk.

empty.title: No urgent blockers
empty.detail: Use the pipeline strip and weekly numbers to decide the next sales, production, or payout move.

activeClippers.label: Active clippers
activeClippers.detail: {count, plural, one {# clip due or in progress} other {# clips due or in progress}}

estimatedProfit.label: Estimated profit
estimatedProfit.detail: Booked minus creator cost and open payouts

risk.label: Risk
risk.detail: {count, plural, one {# broken token signal} other {# broken token signals}}

drillIns.noRisk: No campaign pace risks in the next 7 days.

weeklyClose.title: Weekly close
weeklyClose.detail: Confirm approved clips, finalize payout runs, then log guide updates before the next reporting cycle.

commandCenter.name: Command Center
commandCenter.detail: Today first view of work, money, and risk

leads.name: Leads
leads.detail: Lead pipeline, follow-ups, owner, and value

brandOnboarding.name: Brand Onboarding
brandOnboarding.detail: Contract, payment, brief, assets, and assigned clippers

clipperDatabase.name: Clipper Database
clipperDatabase.detail: Creator profiles, operations, capacity, and assigned brands

contentProduction.name: Content Production
contentProduction.detail: Assignments, due dates, revisions, and submissions

clipReview.name: Clip Review
clipReview.detail: Scorecards, logo review, approvals, and signals

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.detail: Reusable package templates for brand and campaign planning

documents.name: Documents
documents.detail: Contracts, briefs, owners, links, and renewal dates

guides.name: Guides
guides.detail: Searchable operating guides with review owners

weeklyNumbers.name: Weekly Numbers
weeklyNumbers.detail: Saved weekly review snapshots from live data

page.title: Campaigns
page.description: {count, plural, one {# campaign available} other {# campaigns available}}
page.marketplaceDescription: Campaigns sorted by eligibility and payout by default.
page.joinedDescription: Campaigns you can act on next.

guide.intro: New to campaigns? Learn how they work.
guide.howIntro: Understanding how campaigns work helps you choose the right work, submit clips cleanly, and track earnings without surprises.
guide.durationDeadline: Deadline-based: posts can be submitted until the campaign deadline. After that, submissions close.
guide.durationBudget: Budget-based: campaigns may continue until the budget is spent or the sponsor ends the work.
guide.payoutRate: Payrate-based: you earn a flat rate per tracked view.
guide.payoutPot: Pot-style: payouts are proportional to your share of total campaign views.
guide.rulesIntro: By participating in campaigns, you agree to follow these rules. Violations may result in removal and forfeiture of earnings.
guide.noBotting: Botting and fake engagement are not allowed in any capacity.
guide.audience: Do not join campaigns with audience requirements that do not match your own audience.
guide.requirements: Submitted posts must follow the campaign-specific creative, disclosure, and platform requirements.

empty.noJoinedDescription: Browse the marketplace to find campaigns that match your platforms and niche.
empty.noMatchesDescription: Try clearing the filters or changing the search.

detail.programRulesDescription: Requirements and payout limits for this campaign.
detail.trackedOrClaimed: Based on tracked or claimed views
detail.noClipsDescription: Submit a clip from your connected social accounts and it will appear here.

contactSupport.title: Need help with this campaign?
contactSupport.description: Support now runs through Discord so the team can keep every request in one place.
contactSupport.ticketCopy: Go to #help and click the ticket button. Add your campaign name, issue, and any screenshots so we can help faster.

apply.connectRequiredDescription: {count, plural, one {Connect your {platforms} account to join this campaign.} other {Connect your {platforms} accounts to join this campaign.}}
apply.discordPrompt: Connect your Discord account to join campaigns.
apply.closedDescription: This campaign has ended and no longer accepts submissions.
apply.alreadyApplied: You have already joined this campaign.

contact.title: Campaign contact
contact.noSubmissionsDescription: You need to create content on this campaign first before contacting the brand.
contact.noOwnerDescription: This campaign has no owner. Please contact support.
contact.rulesDescription: You can send one message per submission. Wait for the brand to reply before sending another message.

leaderboard.title: Campaign leaderboard
leaderboard.emptyDescription: Be the first: submit a clip to claim the top spot.

page.title: My Clips
page.description: Manage your clips and track performance
page.unsettledDisclaimer: Posts have to be accepted for the earnings to enter the wallet.

list.noClipsDescription: Submit your first clip from a campaign you have joined to start earning.
list.noQueueDescription: Use another queue to view the rest of the submitted clips.
list.thresholdMessage: You need {views} views to start earning with this video

detail.earningsDisclaimer: The post has to be accepted for the earnings to enter the wallet.
detail.thresholdMessage: You need {views} views to start earning with this video

page.title: Payments
page.description: Follow earnings from approved clips into withdrawal requests and payout history.

tabs.title: Payment workspace
tabs.missingDestination: Add a withdrawal destination before requesting your next payout.

overview.earningsDescription: Approved clip earnings grouped by campaign.
overview.noEarningsDescription: Once your clips are approved, your campaign earnings will appear here.

history.noPayoutsDescription: Your balance is paid out weekly. Once we send a payout, it will show up here.

withdraw.tooltip: Save the bank account where withdrawals should be processed.
withdraw.methodDescription: Withdrawals are shown and requested in EUR. Save your IBAN and account holder name before requesting a bank transfer.
withdraw.amountCentError: Use no more than two decimals.
withdraw.saveError: An error occurred while saving bank details
withdraw.bankRequired: Add your IBAN and account holder name before requesting a payout.
withdraw.saveToUnlock: Save bank details above to unlock withdrawal
withdraw.confirmText: We will move {amount} to pending and manually pay it to {accountName} at {iban}.
withdraw.noWithdrawalsDescription: Withdrawals you request will show up here once they are submitted.

page.title: Referral Program
page.description: Earn up to €100 for every creator you invite - paid as 10% of their earnings until you hit the €100 cap. We pay 110%: creators keep 100%, your share is on top.
page.emptyTitle: Invite a creator, earn up to €100 per signup
page.emptyDescription: Share your link below. Every clipper who signs up under it earns you up to €100 - paid as 10% of their payouts until that cap. They still keep 100%; our platform covers your share.

link.title: Your referral link
link.description: Share this link with creators. You earn 10% of their payouts until the €100 cap.
link.discordTooltip: Copies a formatted message you can paste into Discord
link.shareText: Join me on ClipProfit and start earning from your content!
link.mailBody: Hey! I have been using ClipProfit to earn from my content. Sign up with my referral link and let's both earn:
link.discordMessage: **Earn from your clips on ClipProfit** - sign up with my link and we both earn: {url}

milestone.title: Referral milestone
milestone.invited: {count, plural, one {# creator invited} other {# creators invited}}
milestone.next: {count, plural, one {# more invite} other {# more invites}}
milestone.maxDescription: You passed {count} invites. Thanks for spreading the word.

table.creator: Creator
table.emptyDescription: Share your link. When someone signs up and starts earning, they will appear here.

activity.emptyStart: No activity yet. Share your referral link to get started.

leaderboard.empty: No referrers yet. Be the first!

form.title: Profile Details
form.bioPlaceholder: Tell businesses about your page and audience
form.primaryGeoHelper: The country where most of your audience is located
form.evmWalletHelper: EVM-compatible wallet (Ethereum, Polygon, etc.). Required to receive creator payouts.
form.evmWalletInvalid: EVM wallet address must be a valid Ethereum address (0x...)
form.usdtWalletHelper: Required to launch campaigns. Unspent campaign budget is refunded here.
form.tronWalletInvalid: Tron wallet must start with T and be 34 characters

balance.minWithdrawal: Minimum withdrawal amount is €20. Current available: {amount}
balance.historyDescription: Track your payment status and timing.
balance.noWithdrawalsDescription: Your payout history will appear here.

community.title: ClipProfit Community
community.description: Connect with creators, campaign tips, and new opportunities.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Clips submitted in the last {weeks} weeks.
activity.emptyDescription: Submit your first clip to start building your activity history.
activity.dayCount: {count, plural, one {# clip} other {# clips}} on {date}

linked.title: Facebook connected
linked.description: Your Facebook Page is connected and ready for tracking.

denied.title: Facebook connection cancelled
denied.description: Permission was not granted. Try connecting again when you are ready.

failed.title: Facebook connection failed
failed.description: We could not start the connection. Please try again.

stateMismatch.title: Facebook connection expired
stateMismatch.description: For your security, start the Facebook connection again.

missingScopes.title: Facebook needs more permissions
missingScopes.description: Grant all requested permissions so ClipProfit can track your page.

noPages.title: No Facebook Pages found
noPages.description: Connect with a Facebook account that manages at least one Page.

noProfile.title: Creator profile missing
noProfile.description: Finish your creator profile before connecting Facebook.

appInvalid.title: Facebook app configuration needs attention
appInvalid.description: The connection is using an invalid Facebook app. The team can review the server logs.

redirectMismatch.title: Facebook redirect does not match
redirectMismatch.description: The callback URL needs to match Meta settings before connecting.

tokenExchangeFailed.title: Facebook token exchange failed
tokenExchangeFailed.description: Facebook rejected the connection response. Please try again shortly.

page.emptyDescription: Keep the pages you post from connected, verified, and ready for tracking.
page.headerDescription: Manage connected pages and explore performance, all in one place.
page.noPagesDescription: Use the connect button above to choose a platform and add the first page.
page.noAdminAccountsDescription: This clipper has not connected a verified posting account yet.

connect.title: Connect a platform
connect.description: Choose the platform you want to connect for tracking and submissions.
connect.disconnectTitle: Are you sure you want to disconnect this page?
connect.disconnectDescription: Disconnecting {label} stops stat tracking and submissions from this account. You can reconnect later from this page.

facebook.title: Use a Facebook Page, not a personal profile
facebook.description: ClipProfit can track Facebook Reels and posts only from Pages you manage. Personal Facebook profiles cannot be connected for tracking.

instagram.title: Use an Instagram professional account
instagram.description: Connect a Business or Creator Instagram profile. Personal Instagram accounts cannot provide the insights ClipProfit needs.

connectWarning.saveError: Could not save that preference. You can still continue.

bio.title: Bio verification
bio.pending: Add the verification code to your bio, then check again.
bio.failed: We could not verify the code yet.

page.title: My Applications
page.empty: You have not applied to any campaigns yet

submit.title: Submit clip
submit.loadError: Could not load your {platform} posts. Please try again.
submit.campaignEnded: This campaign has ended and no longer accepts submissions.
submit.campaignPaused: This campaign is paused and temporarily does not accept submissions.
submit.rateLimited: Instagram is rate-limited. Try again in about 1 minute.
submit.prefillNotFound: We could not auto-select that post on this page. Try switching the platform tab or paging back to find it.
submit.connectPromptTitle: You do not have a {platform} account yet
submit.connectPromptDescription: Connect it now to load posts and submit clips.
submit.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# post selected} other {# posts selected}}
submit.selectPosts: Select the posts you want to submit

page.title: Course hub
page.description: Pick a course, finish lessons in order, pass quizzes, and collect badges as proof of completion.
page.availableDescription: Each course includes lesson reading, quiz checks, progress tracking, and badges.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: Campaign, payout, and account updates will appear here.
notifications.allCaughtUpDescription: New campaign updates, approvals, and payouts will appear here in real time.

stats.title: Stats
stats.comingSoon: Stats are available from your Accounts page.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: What has changed in ClipProfit lately. Newest first.

activationChecklist.title: Cleaner dashboard with an activation checklist
activationChecklist.description: Your dashboard now greets you by name, alerts you when something needs attention, and shows a step-by-step checklist until you have made your first payout.

paymentsPage.title: Wallet and Payouts are now one Payments page
paymentsPage.description: Overview, withdrawals, and history live in three tabs. The old /creator/wallet link still works.

campaignQualification.title: Campaign cards show whether you qualify
campaignQualification.description: Each card now tells you instantly whether you meet the platform and follower requirements, plus highlights campaigns ending in the next 7 days.

connectAccountPrompt.title: We now ask before connecting an account
connectAccountPrompt.description: Connecting an account opens a short panel explaining exactly what we will access and what we will not do before sending you to the platform.

feedbackDrawer.title: In-app feedback drawer
feedbackDrawer.description: Use the Feedback button at the top to send a bug report or feature request. Page, browser, and viewport are auto-attached.
